title: i18n policy, glossary, and product naming

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: i18n policy decision brief

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... import apps/web/src/i18n.js, count locales, decision options, Wave 1 screen rows, and no register/code change ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify current i18n source state and decision-brief boundaries

commands.command: grep -c "^| I18N-OPT-" docs/product-ui/i18n-policy.md && grep -c "^| I18N-SCREEN-" docs/product-ui/i18n-policy.md
commands.purpose: Verify decision option and Wave 1 screen scope row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is a decision brief only and does not choose Korean-only or bilingual policy.
No launch-decision-register row was created because owner evidence does not exist and the current register key families do not include L4 decisions.

tuw_evidence.title: Product UI glossary draft

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count TERM, NAME-LAYER, FORBID, L2-XWALK rows and verify old UI brand phrase absent from apps/web/src ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify glossary draft contains required terminology, naming layers, forbidden patterns, and L2-W06 crosswalk without app code changes

commands.command: grep -c "^| TERM-" docs/product-ui/glossary.md && grep -c "^| NAME-LAYER-" docs/product-ui/glossary.md && grep -c "^| L2-XWALK-" docs/product-ui/glossary.md
commands.purpose: Verify glossary term, product naming layer, and L2 crosswalk row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is a glossary draft only; final UI copy validation and any app changes belong to LT-L4-W05-T03.
The glossary imports L2-W06 product naming and homonym rules and provides 36 Wave 1 UI/training term rows.
The owner i18n policy decision remains pending.

tuw_evidence.title: App copy audit before approved cleanup

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... scan apps/web/src strings for Matter/AMIC Law/Project Atlas/Raw Event/Billing/AI/storage-risk terms and verify no app source diff ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify current app-copy state and cleanup blockers without modifying apps/web source

commands.command: rg -n "matter by AMIC Law" apps/web/src | wc -l && rg -n "Law Firm OS" apps/web/src | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify old UI brand phrase is absent while Law Firm OS user-facing candidates remain for cleanup

commands.command: grep -c "^| COPY-CAND-" docs/product-ui/app-copy-audit.md && grep -c "^| COPY-SCAN-" docs/product-ui/app-copy-audit.md
commands.purpose: Verify app copy audit review queue and scan summary row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is an app-copy audit only; no apps/web source file was modified.
MatterLogo aria-label already matches matter by AMIC and the old UI brand phrase matter by AMIC Law is absent.
LT-L4-W05-T03 remains open because owner i18n policy, Wave 1 source scope, source copy cleanup, and rendered UI validation are not complete.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L4-W05, LT-L4-W05-T01, LT-L4-W05-T02, or LT-L4-W05-T03 is complete.
This record does not choose a language policy.
This record does not update the launch decision register or modify apps/web source.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
